violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (blenders) were observed with a slight accumulation of food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Staff washed, rinsed, sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining inside the unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment is aware of issue and has a work order in place. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (inside of blender caps) were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Blenders washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the time of inspection. Equipment to be replaced as needed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Sweet potatoes and corn, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Cooling methods guide and logs left with person in charge at the time of inspection. Cooling logs to be filled for review by inspector at the next inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the blender containers have an accumulation of black residue. Non-food contact surfaces are to be cleaned as often as necessary or replaced as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The cutting boards in the ware-washing area and on the back prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
